articles.title: Starship ready for V3 maiden flight — launch set for May 12
articles.summary: After months of delays, SpaceX is preparing to launch the first generation-three Starship — the largest and most powerful rocket configuration ever built.
articles.author: Mission Desk

articles.title: Falcon Heavy: Just one launch in 2026 — is the era over?
articles.summary: ViaSat-3 F3 was the first Falcon Heavy flight since October 2024. What does the quiet manifest mean for the vehicle's future?
articles.author: Mission Desk

articles.title: 50 launches in four months — SpaceX sets a new industry standard
articles.summary: On April 26, SpaceX hit 50 launches so far in 2026. On track for a 160-flight year — and 80 percent of the manifest is Starlink.
articles.author: Mission Desk

articles.title: Starlink crossed 10,000 satellites — the largest constellation in history
articles.summary: In April, Starlink crossed 10,000 active satellites. The constellation is now five times larger than all other operational satellite systems combined.
articles.author: Mission Desk

articles.title: Booster B1069 flew for the 31st time — reuse at a level no one foresaw
articles.summary: Falcon 9 booster B1069 set a world record for orbital-class booster reuse with its 31st flight on May 1.
articles.author: Mission Desk
